steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The student wants to connect Save Me to the history of neon in art. The relevant note: neon signs became popular with artists in the $1960$s and remain so today. So the sentence should place Steele's work within that artistic lineage.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Choice B explicitly places Steele in the "decades-long lineage of artists" who have used neon as an artistic medium since the $1960$s — the precise connection requested.
  • A blends advertising with art (the goal is art-history specifically)
  • C broadens to advertising too
  • D incorrectly claims neon's artistic popularity has declined (the note says it continues today)
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
